name: The Neefra
description:
рЯСљрЯ™Р The hypnotic shimmer of the Neefra, iridescent slugs from another galaxy, has given these new invaders an advantage here on earth. If the Neefra were (are?) capable of retrospection, the potential symbiotic relationship between earthlings and aliens could provide both with the benefits of an interplanetary alliance. Human beings seem transfixed on the prismatic sheen of their velvet-y soft 'skin' in combination with the subtle shimmer of the slime Neefra coat themselves in to help with locomotion.

It also doesn't help it is a strong aphrodisiac and can pass through mucus membranes and the epidermis of humans easily.

Without any investigations into the aliens yet, humans have given into their impulse and curiosity, caving to their urges to touch and inspect the critters.Though most of these interactions start genuinely innocent and pure, the Neefra need to feed and, well, earthling bodies emit so many delicious hormones and chemicals while aroused, while being pleasured... And the Neefra won't stop until they get their fill.

Oh, and Neefra colonies can have populations upwards of 25.

вАҐвФИвАҐвАҐвЬ¶ вЭ§ вЬ¶вАҐвАҐвФИвАҐ вШЕгАВпЉЉрЯМЯпЉПгАВвШЕ вАҐвФИвАҐвАҐвЬ¶ вЭ§ вЬ¶вАҐвАҐвФИвАҐ

Not sure what, if any trigger warnings are needed here. I noticed my friends who are monster fuckers all have wider palettes for who they'd bang than me. Alien slugs 100% do it for me if they are this prismatic and glamorous somehow -- I hope they do it for you too.

Thank you all for enjoying my (mostly problematic??? oops) perverted characters so far рЯ•є I'm constantly surprised more than 2 people look and I feel very humbled folks have looked or engaged with them at all. I have some less dead-dove situations and characters I may release soon but I worry they may fall flat now.

Guess we'll see! Anyway, here's more smaller space slugs being wholesome in a pictaresque garden instead of hole-some in some human orifice.
creator: uhoh_ohno
